message:
✨ Add merged badge, closed-by-you detection, and fix preview link visibility

- Add "Merged" badge with thank you message for fix_complete status
- Fetch both open and closed issues/PRs to keep merged items in queue
- Fix PR merge detection to use merged_at instead of merged boolean
- Add closed_by_user field to detect when current user closed issue
- Show "Closed by You" badge for issues closed by the viewing user
- Hide preview link for user-closed requests (no longer relevant)
- Preserve GitHub issue links for all states including closed/merged

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
